name: SANCTION
short_description: SANCTION is a procedurally generated FPS/RPG where you are a prisoner sanctioned to come from the safety of your doomsday bunker to gather supplies for the community. Your freedom and your community's livelihood rely on you. Survive the desolate wasteland left by the final war.
detailed_description:
SANCTION is a procedurally generated FPS/RPG where you are a prisoner sanctioned to come from the safety of your doomsday bunker to gather supplies for the community. Your freedom and your community's livelihood rely on you. Survive the desolate wasteland left by the final war.

HOW TO SURVIVE

Desperate to survive, you’ll scavenge ruins, forge alliances, and take on faction quests. Food and water are scarce, but don’t neglect your community, or your air filters. Replenish them through supply drops, merchants, or the remains of past scavengers referred to as kettle-heads or white suits.

LIFE WITHIN THE FOG

Amidst the wasteland, you'll encounter factions, merchants, and hostile 'life' on the surface.

Spirit-Walkers, once buried bodies, carry an early vaccine designed to change the afterlife to the consumers wishes within the diseased brain. When fallout from the war contaminated these brains, they reawakened in angelic forms, a common afterlife wish gone horribly wrong.

Anomalous Orbs, a volatile, predatory form of matter that devours anything living. Created to guard artifacts, these orbs were left behind by an alien species that briefly visited during the Final War, seizing the chaos as an opportunity to steal Earth's resources and technology.

AI Drones, as death tolls surpassed %50 of the global population, a wealthy corporation developed fully autonomous bombing drones. Powered by solar and wind, they resupply from stockpiles. These drones continue their objective even after the collapse of the corporation.

SKILL PILLS

Every morning as per company protocol, you will be given the choice of a free skill pill. They will enhance traits such as luck, agility, vitality, appetite or even your lungs. Each enhancement will last until you return home from your sentence.

BEETLE BREEDING

Beetles are a great protein source and an unexpected supplier of all kinds of items. Breed them to create odd combinations and watch as they gather specific items for you, all from the comfort of your bunker.

ANOMALOUS RITUALS

Use a ritual altar to harness the energy of anomalous artifacts and practice dark arts. Convert their energy to duplicate any item placed at the altar, cheap ones are easy, but valuable ones demand much more power.
